title: Cashhew's Armor Trim Compat
description: Custom modded Materials and Patterns made compatible!
body:
When using modded armor together with custom trim patterns and custom trim materials, Minecraft can sometimes fail to find the correct textures. This usually results in the infamous pink-and-black “missing texture” visuals. This resource pack resolves those issues by adding the missing trim texture support for specific mod combinations.

While similar compatibility packs already exist, this pack focuses on filling in the gaps by covering trim combinations that were previously missing or unsupported.

If you have a mod suggestion, feel free to let me know by joining the [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/sj8QjJgncQ). I may look into adding support in the future.

The current mods include:

- **Eternal Starlight**
- **Enderscape**
- **Supplementaries**
- **Create mod cardboard armor**
- **Vanilla? (If you count it cuz I fixed Bolt and Flow😎)**
